rationale: The proposed change modifies a property tax homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §254.039 governs campaign finance reporting deadlines for general-purpose committees. The provisions address unrelated subject matters and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 254.039. SPECIAL REPORT NEAR ELECTION BY CERTAIN GENERAL-PURPOSE COMMITTEES.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption change and campaign finance reporting rules.
